texto: She doesn't know any other way to express her love, it always flowed like a river inside her. Don't judge her for the way she love .Like an artist she carves each relation in her life wholeheartedly. Now its an art work , you might not like her art but don't doubt her love which created that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Archna Mohan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “She doesn't know any other way to express her love, it always flowed like a river inside her. Don…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, love-quotes, doesn pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e reflexao.

frase_original: She doesn't know any other way to express her love, it always flowed like a river inside her. Don't judge her for the way she love .Like an artist she carves each relation in her life wholeheartedly. Now its an art work , you might not like her art but don't doubt her love which created that.
